productDisplayName: John Players Men Printed Grey T-Shirt
description: Composition Grey T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves, and graphic with flock print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low and dry flat in shade inside out Warm iron This festive season, spread the cheer and paint the world with joy in this T-shirt from john players. The flock print in the form of a star adds zing to the blue spray graphic print on the front of this tee. Team it with jeans and sneakers.
